fact_nuggets.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Tar Shot lowers the target's Speed stat by one stage and doubles the effectiveness of Fire-type moves used on the target. Tar Shot will not double the effectiveness of Fire-type moves used on a target that is already under the effect of Tar Shot (but may still lower its Speed). The increased vulnerability to Fire-type attacks does not affect a Pokemon that is Terastallized , however if a Pokemon already affected by the increased vulnerability Terastallizes, the effect will remain. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokemon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Tar Shot cannot be selected in a battle.
